title: Project Properites IO Monitor
description:
Project Properites IO Monitor

IO Monitor page:  Project Properties

Use this page to configure the I/O Monitor for operators.

Item	Description

Select
		 views for operators	Configures
		 the I/O views that operators use when opening the [I/O Monitor]
		 from the [Operator Window]. You can configure the custom views.

Allow
		 I/O status change for operator	Check
		 this box if you want to allow operators to turn on or off the
		 inputs and outputs.
